plugins.name: meetstream
plugins.description: Build meeting bots, transcription, and recording with MeetStream. Scaffolds notetakers, real-time sales coaches, CRM auto-updaters, and Recall.ai migrations. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams. Every endpoint live-tested against api.meetstream.ai — no hallucinations.
